rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) (residence homestead exemption) does not intersect with Health & Safety Code §311.045, which governs nonprofit hospital charity care. The statute cross-references Tax Code §§11.18, 151.310, and 171.063—not §11.13.
quote: A nonprofit hospital or hospital system shall annually satisfy the requirements of this subchapter and of Sections 11.18(d)(1), 151.310(a)(2) and (e), and 171.063(a)(1), Tax Code, to provide community benefits which include charity care and government-sponsored indigent health care by complying with one or more of the standards set forth in Subsection (b).
_note: No cross-reference to Tax Code §11.13 exists in this statute; the referenced provisions are §11.18, §151.310, and §171.063.
